case_title: FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES, LP, VS. RAUL GONZALEZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES, LP, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, RAUL DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES, LP, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, RAUL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1510 EDDY STREET, #703 CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94115, LEASE FORFEITED, **APPLIES TO ALL UNNAMED/UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS.**
